_doc: Story 5.6 (FR20) — EN crisis-resource list. Curated and verified. Each entry MUST have name, url (https or tel), and lastVerified (ISO YYYY-MM-DD).

resources.name: 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline (US)
resources.description: 24/7 free and confidential support for people in distress; call or text 988 anywhere in the US.

resources.name: Crisis Text Line (US/UK/Ireland/Canada)
resources.description: Text HOME to 741741 (US), 85258 (UK), or 50808 (Ireland) to reach a trained crisis counselor.

resources.name: Samaritans (UK and Ireland)
resources.description: Free 24/7 helpline; call 116 123 from anywhere in the UK or Republic of Ireland.

resources.name: Lifeline (Australia)
resources.description: Free 24/7 crisis support; call 13 11 14 anywhere in Australia.

resources.name: International Association for Suicide Prevention — Crisis Resources Directory
resources.description: Searchable directory of crisis centres worldwide for readers outside the US/UK/Ireland/Australia.
